headline: Advanced Support for Energy, Strength, and
hero_subtext_1: Prime Pulse Male is a premium natural supplement crafted to enhance male vitality, support steady energy levels, and improve overall performance.
hero_subtext_2: Formulated with carefully chosen ingredients to help boost stamina, promote confidence, and support an active lifestyle when combined with healthy daily habits.
benefits_headline: Support Your Energy, Stamina & Performance Naturally
benefits_paragraphs: Prime Pulse Male is designed to enhance male vitality, maintain steady energy levels, and support overall performance with a blend of natural ingredients.
Many users rely on Prime Pulse as part of their daily routine to help maintain steady energy, improve balance, and support performance naturally without depending on harsh stimulants.
The formula combines natural ingredients known for their role in promoting vitality and endurance, helping the body function more efficiently throughout the day.
features_subheadline: Backed by Science, Crafted for Performance

features.title: Tongkat Ali Extract
features.description: Widely recognized for supporting male vitality and natural energy levels, helping enhance stamina, strength, and overall performance.

features.title: Maca Root
features.description: Traditionally used to support endurance, energy, and vitality, helping maintain consistent stamina and daily performance.

features.title: L-Arginine
features.description: A key amino acid that supports healthy blood circulation, contributing to improved performance and cardiovascular health.

features.title: Ginseng Extract
features.description: Helps boost natural energy, reduce fatigue, and support stamina, promoting consistent focus and performance throughout the day.

features.title: Zinc
features.description: An essential mineral that supports hormone balance and overall male wellness, while also contributing to immune health and vitality.

features.title: Vitamin B Complex
features.description: Supports natural energy production and helps reduce fatigue, enhancing daily performance and overall well-being.

features.title: Fenugreek Extract
features.description: Commonly used to support strength, energy, and male vitality, helping maintain endurance, performance, and confidence.

features.title: Natural Performance Blend
features.description: A proprietary blend formulated to support energy, stamina, and overall performance while promoting long-term balance and wellness.

science_subheadline: Support Your Body's Core Systems for Peak Performance
science_title: The Science Behind Prime Pulse Male

science_steps.text: The formula encourages steady energy release and supports both physical and mental performance, helping reduce tiredness throughout the day.
Natural ingredients work together to improve endurance and physical performance, helping you maintain strength and consistent activity levels.
May also assist in improving focus, motivation, and confidence by promoting internal balance and supporting long-term male wellness.

science_result: Experience sustained energy without sudden crashes, allowing for improved productivity and daily performance.
reviews_subheadline: Real results from real men using Prime Pulse Male

reviews.body: I've been taking Prime Pulse Male for a few weeks now, and I've noticed a clear improvement in my energy and daily productivity. It has become an essential part of my routine.
reviews.name: John M.

reviews.body: Very easy to use and delivered on time. After adding Prime Pulse to my routine, I experienced better stamina and improved focus throughout the day.
reviews.name: Michael T.

reviews.body: Great value, especially with the bundle offers. Since using Prime Pulse Male, I feel more energized, confident, and consistent in my everyday activities.
reviews.name: Robert K.

faq_items.question: Is Prime Pulse Male safe to use?
faq_items.answer: Prime Pulse Male is made with natural ingredients and produced under strict quality standards. It is designed to support energy, performance, and overall wellness. If you have any medical condition or are taking medication, consult a healthcare professional before use.

faq_items.question: How should I take Prime Pulse Male?
faq_items.answer: Follow the recommended daily serving as part of your routine for best results. Consistent use helps maintain steady energy, performance, and long-term vitality.

faq_items.question: What if I'm not satisfied with my purchase?
faq_items.answer: Your purchase is protected by a 60-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied, you can request a refund within 60 days through a quick and simple process.

faq_items.question: Is this a subscription or recurring charge?
faq_items.answer: No, this is a one-time purchase with no subscriptions or recurring billing.

faq_items.question: Why is the 6 bottle package recommended?
faq_items.answer: The 6-bottle package provides the best value and ensures consistent use, helping Prime Pulse support long-term results while maximizing savings.

faq_items.question: How long does shipping take?
faq_items.answer: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days within the United States. Expedited shipping options are available at checkout.

footer_description: Prime Pulse Male is a premium natural supplement crafted to enhance male vitality, support steady energy levels, and improve overall performance. Made in the USA with premium, naturally sourced ingredients.

modals.title: Privacy Policy
modals.intro: Last updated: March 2026. This Privacy Policy describes how Prime Pulse and its authorized distributors collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect personal information that you provide directly to us when you place an order, create an account, or contact customer support. This includes your name, email address, shipping address, billing address, phone number, and payment information.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to process and fulfill your orders, provide customer support, send order confirmations and shipping updates, and improve our website and services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.heading: Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze website traffic. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.heading: Your Rights (CCPA & GDPR)
sections.content: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of marketing communications at any time.

sections.heading: Contact Information
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@primepulse.com or call 1-800-795-3275.

modals.title: Terms of Service
modals.intro: Last updated: March 2026. By accessing this website and purchasing any products, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.heading: Agreement to Terms
sections.content: By using this website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.heading: Product Disclaimer
sections.content: Prime Pulse Male is a dietary supplement designed for adult men. Follow all instructions on the product label. Results may vary based on individual circumstances.

sections.heading: Age Restriction
sections.content: You must be at least 18 years of age to purchase products from this website. By placing an order, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old.

sections.heading: Order Acceptance
sections.content: We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order for any reason. All prices are subject to change without notice.

sections.heading: Shipping
sections.content: Shipping times are estimates only and do not guarantee delivery by a specific date. Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery to the shipping carrier.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties. In no event shall our liability exceed the purchase price paid for the product.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: For questions about these Terms, please contact support@primepulse.com or call 1-800-795-3275.

modals.title: Returns & Refunds
modals.intro: We offer a 60-day money-back guarantee on all Prime Pulse Male orders.

sections.heading: 60-Day Money-Back Guarantee
sections.content: If for any reason you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you may return the product(s) within 60 days from the date of delivery for a full refund. No questions asked.

sections.heading: How to Initiate a Return
sections.content: To request a return and refund, please contact our customer support team at support@primepulse.com with your order number. Our support team will respond within 1-2 business days with return instructions.

sections.heading: Refund Processing
sections.content: Refunds are typically processed within 5-10 business days after we receive your returned product. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.

sections.heading: Damaged or Defective Products
sections.content: If you receive a damaged or defective product, please contact us immediately with photos of the damaged item and packaging. We will arrange for a free replacement or full refund.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: For returns and refund requests, please contact support@primepulse.com or call 1-800-795-3275 (Monday-Friday, 9AM-5PM EST).

modals.intro: We value our customers and are here to help with any questions or concerns.
